title: Senate crypto bill at risk beyond midterms if not passed by August: NYDIG
summary: NYDIG’s Greg Cipolaro says the Senate’s crypto market structure bill is at risk of failing if it cannot clear a floor vote by August.

title: Analysts debate whether Bitcoin is in a ‘sell in May’ bear market setup
summary: Some analysts argue that a comparatively broadened, institutionalized buyer base for crypto today may prevent a repeat of the drawdowns seen in May 2018 and May 2022.

title: PolyPeptide Is Said to Shortlist EQT, IDG for Next Bidding Round
summary: PolyPeptide Group AG has shortlisted private equity firms EQT AB and IDG Capital in the next round of bidding for the Swiss contract drugmaker, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Oil Rises as Trump Renews Threats Against Iran With Hormuz Shut
summary: Oil rose for a third day as President Donald Trump again pressured Iran to come to a deal to end weeks of war and reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

title: Abu Dhabi’s Mubadala Raises Bitcoin ETF Stake 16% to $566 Million in Q1 2026

Mubadala Investment Company boosted its stake in BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust by 16% in Q1 2026.

title: KuCoin Australia’s ‘Evolution’ Showcases Regulatory Focus, Mastercard Launch
summary: The exchange’s KuCard rollout enables users to make "seamless payments" to Mastercard merchants using USDC.

title: What Is Arc? The Stablecoin Blockchain From USDC Issuer Circle
summary: Arc is a new layer-1 blockchain developed by USDC issuer Circle, designed specifically for stablecoin-native finance.

title: US crypto ATM operator Bitcoin Depot files for Chapter 11 to wind down business
summary: Bitcoin Depot said changing regulatory environments have made it difficult to continue its current business model.

title: What are Real-World Assets (RWAs)?
summary: Real-world assets (RWAs) are crypto tokens backed by traditional assets. Issuers of RWAs take an existing asset — such as gold, fiat currency, stocks or bonds — and create a token representing it on the blockchain, in a process called “tokenization.” The token now represents ownership in

title: Mortgage costs rise sharply on Middle East conflict
summary: Home loans have become more expensive in North America and Europe despite central banks keeping rates on hold

title: Global bonds extend sell-off on inflation fears
summary: US and Japanese yields rise amid investor concern over surge in energy prices
